DISA.note: Large crabgrass may be southern crabgrass

Brassica_complex_0.note: Includes Brassica napus (BRNA), Brassica rapa (BRRA), Brassica juncea (BRJU), Sinapis alba (SIAL5)

Notes.1: USDA symbols are used as species index key.
Notes.2: When difference between USDA and EPPO codes, scientific_names, or authority occured, USDA information was used.
Notes.3: Purple nutsedge (CYRO) is used but may also be yellow nutsedge (CYES) for years 2022, and 2023.
Notes.5: Brassicas class contains 4 species - Brassica napus, Brassica rapa, Brassica juncea, Brassica hirta
Notes.6: Large crabgrass collected in NC may be southern crabgrass.
Notes.7: Large crabgrass collected at any location maybe Large or other Spp.
Notes.8: Smooth pigweed (AMHY) may also be Redroot pigweed (AMRE).
Notes.9: USDA plant profile links for class id 48-55 are updated. The rest are not working.
